message:
Command `echo "=== $(date) ==="
ps -p 824793 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "LR alive" || echo "LR DONE"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -10
echo "---"
ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL GDS!" || echo "no GDS"
echo "---"
grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|num_drc" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -6` executed with exit code 0.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
